exam.invalid_passing_score: Passing score must be between 0 and 100.
exam.cannot_unpublish_after_attempts: Cannot unpublish the exam because it already has student submissions.
exam.cannot_delete_has_submission: Cannot delete the exam because it already has student submissions.
exam.missing_questions: Cannot publish an exam that contains no question s
exam.invalid_question_exam_relation: The question does not belong to the specified exam.
exam.invalid_question_type: The specified question type is invalid.
exam.question_must_have_options: A question must have at least one option.
exam.true_false_must_have_two_options: A True/False question must have exactly two options.
exam.true_false_must_have_one_correct: A True/False question must have exactly one correct option.
exam.single_choice_must_have_one_correct: A single-choice question must have exactly one correct option.
exam.multiple_choice_must_have_at_least_: A multiple-choice question must have at least two correct options.
exam.single_choice_must_have_between_3_a: Single choice questions must have between 3 and 6 options.
exam.multiple_choice_must_have_between_3: Multiple choice questions must have between 3 and 10 options.
